Description: Main supply duct routing directly through PT tendon zone in slab. Cannot core or modify PT layout.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted duct below slab with bulkhead. Added 200mm ceiling depth reduction in corridor.

Description: Electrical cable tray routed through 600mm deep concrete beam at column line B.
Resolution_Description: Relocated cable tray to route under beam with 45-degree drop. Added junction box at transition.

Description: Exhaust duct and chilled water pipe occupy same space at ceiling level in commercial tenant area.
Resolution_Description: Lowered chilled water pipe by 150mm. Adjusted hangers.

Description: Sprinkler main penetrating PT tendon band. Cannot sleeve through PT zone.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted sprinkler main around tendon band with additional elbow and 3m of pipe. Added head relocation.

Description: Condensate drain and electrical conduit within 20mm - insufficient clearance for insulation.
Resolution_Description: Shifted condensate drain 40mm north. No other impacts.

Description: Kitchen exhaust riser from commercial tenant conflicts with structural shear wall. 500mm penetration required through 300mm shear wall.
Resolution_Description: Structural engineer designed reinforced opening with steel header. Riser shifted 200mm east to miss main reinforcement.

Description: Sanitary stack and supply duct intersect at floor 8 ceiling space. Stack is gravity - cannot reroute vertically.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted supply duct with offset around stack. Added flex connection at offset.

Description: Bus duct and chilled water riser within 30mm in riser room. Insufficient clearance for maintenance access.
Resolution_Description: Shifted bus duct 200mm west within riser room. Updated supports on floors 8-16.

Description: VAV box and recessed light fixture competing for same ceiling cavity space.
Resolution_Description: Relocated light fixture 300mm south. No architectural impact.

Description: Storm drain routing through parkade grade beam. Cannot penetrate without structural compromise.
Resolution_Description: Structural engineer designed reinforced sleeve through grade beam. Storm drain lowered 100mm with new invert.

Description: Sprinkler branch line running through return air duct.
Resolution_Description: Lowered sprinkler branch 75mm below duct soffit. Adjusted head coverage pattern.

Description: Rooftop-level exhaust fan unit support structure conflicts with transfer beam at level 5 commercial-residential transition.
Resolution_Description: Relocated exhaust fan 1.5m north. Added supplementary steel for new support location. Structural redesign of connection.

Description: Domestic water pipe and fire alarm conduit within 15mm at ceiling level.
Resolution_Description: Reclipped fire alarm conduit 50mm higher using existing support channel.

Description: Energy recovery ventilator unit height exceeds available space above corridor bulkhead.
Resolution_Description: Selected lower-profile ERV model. Raised bulkhead 75mm - coordinated with architect for minimum corridor height compliance.

Description: Data tray and condensate pipe within 25mm - concern about condensation dripping on data cables.
Resolution_Description: Added drip pan under condensate pipe at crossing point. Insulated pipe for 1m either side.

Description: Main make-up air duct from rooftop unit cannot clear structural column in ground floor commercial space.
Resolution_Description: Split duct into two 400x600 ducts routed on either side of column. Added turning vanes and splitter damper.

Description: Plumbing vent stack and fire standpipe riser in same chase - insufficient space for both.
Resolution_Description: Offset standpipe riser 150mm into adjacent chase space. Coordinated with architectural for access panel relocation.

Description: Main electrical switchboard door swing conflicts with chilled water header pipe routing in P1 electrical room.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted chilled water header to opposite wall of electrical room. Added 6m of pipe and 4 supports.

Description: Sprinkler drop location conflicts with ceiling grid T-bar. Head will not sit flush.
Resolution_Description: Shifted sprinkler drop 100mm to align with ceiling grid module. Updated coverage calc - still compliant.

Description: Parkade exhaust duct requires 500mm depth but only 380mm available below PT slab at perimeter.
Resolution_Description: Redesigned duct as flat oval (1200x380). Structural confirmed slab edge can support modified hangers.

Description: Domestic hot water recirc pipe touching insulation of chilled water supply pipe at crossing.
Resolution_Description: Reclipped recirc pipe with 50mm standoff bracket at crossing.

Description: Generator exhaust penetration location conflicts with curtain wall panel joint. Exhaust heat exceeds panel thermal rating.
Resolution_Description: Relocated exhaust penetration 600mm east to solid spandrel panel zone. Added heat-resistant backing plate.

Description: BAS thermostat and light switch gang box on same stud - insufficient mounting space.
Resolution_Description: Relocated light switch to adjacent stud bay. Updated architectural drawing.

Description: Fire damper and duct silencer competing for same duct section at rated wall penetration.
Resolution_Description: Relocated silencer downstream of damper with required 2-duct-width straight run between. Extended duct run by 1.2m.

Description: Roof drain leader and lighting conduit within 10mm at top floor ceiling.
Resolution_Description: Reclipped conduit with offset bracket.

Description: Stair pressurization duct cannot penetrate landing slab at specified location - conflicts with slab reinforcement.
Resolution_Description: Structural designed reinforced sleeve. Duct penetration shifted 300mm to avoid main reinforcement concentration.

Description: Security conduit and gas pipe within 20mm - code requires 50mm minimum separation from gas.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted security conduit with 75mm standoff from gas pipe.

Description: Air handling unit supply plenum extends across mechanical room door swing. Door cannot open fully.
Resolution_Description: Redesigned plenum with 90-degree elbow to clear door swing. Door changed from 900mm to 800mm by architect.

Description: Kitchen fire suppression nozzle pipe conflicts with exhaust duct connection collar at hood.
Resolution_Description: Relocated suppression nozzle 150mm along hood rail. Updated suppression system coverage calculation.

Description: Fan coil unit condensate pan drip edge directly above electrical receptacle box in wall.
Resolution_Description: Extended condensate pan 50mm and added drip edge deflector away from receptacle.

Description: Grease interceptor vent penetration through P2 foundation wall conflicts with waterproofing membrane and rebar.
Resolution_Description: Waterproofing specialist designed puddle flange detail. Structural provided reinforcement modification for penetration.

Description: EV charger conduit and sprinkler lateral within 15mm at parkade ceiling.
Resolution_Description: Reclipped EV conduit with offset bracket at crossing point.

Description: Corridor pressurization duct soffit is 30mm below door head height. Cannot install door frame.
Resolution_Description: Reduced duct to 400x250 with increased velocity. Acoustic analysis confirmed noise level still acceptable.

Description: Smoke detector within 300mm of supply air diffuser - may cause false alarms per code.
Resolution_Description: Relocated smoke detector 700mm from diffuser. Updated fire alarm drawing.

Description: Transformer vault ventilation louver penetration conflicts with below-grade retaining wall waterproofing.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted ventilation to exit at P1 level above grade. Added 8m of ductwork and fire damper at rated wall.

Description: Hose bib supply pipe routed directly behind electrical panel board. Code clearance issue.
Resolution_Description: Rerouted hose bib pipe to enter from opposite side of wall.

Description: Smoke control damper sleeve size exceeds rated wall assembly tested configuration. ULC listing issue.
Resolution_Description: Fire protection engineer redesigned wall penetration with larger tested assembly. Added 2-hour rated collar.

Description: WiFi access point mounting bracket within 50mm of sprinkler head deflector clearance zone.
Resolution_Description: Relocated access point 200mm along ceiling grid. Updated wireless coverage heat map - no dead spots.

Description: Penthouse AHU fresh air intake louver size requires 1200mm opening but parapet wall section only allows 900mm.
Resolution_Description: Under review - options include parapet modification or split intake with two smaller louvers.

Description: Rainwater leader from roof must pass through transfer beam at level 5. Beam is heavily reinforced - penetration may not be feasible.
Resolution_Description: Structural engineer reviewing. May need to reroute leader externally or split to two smaller leaders above transfer level.

Description: Intercom conduit and DHW pipe within 10mm at lobby ceiling. Insulation contact concern.
Resolution_Description: Awaiting coordination meeting Apr 1.

Description: Stair B pressurization fan discharge conflicts with planned rooftop amenity deck layout. Noise and airflow concern for residents.
Resolution_Description: Architect and mechanical engineer reviewing fan relocation options. May require acoustic enclosure.
